approved_foundation.cold_spell_design: E2-S3-COLD-SPELL-ACCEPTANCE-DESIGN approves the diagnostic design but not numerical tolerances.
approved_foundation.d004_source_member_use: D004-SOURCE-MEMBER-ACCEPTANCE approves D-004 source/member use for internal first-screen work only.
approved_foundation.hp001_boundary: Residential SFH/MFH space heat plus domestic hot water using approved D-003 When2Heat shape/COP columns; COM heat excluded.
approved_foundation.indicator_mapping: D013-PBL-MAPPING/A-015 approves only the PBL residential indicator mapping.
approved_foundation.weather_contract: WEATHER-001 requires HP/PV to consume the same shared weather member identity and calendar.

next_pi_decision: Approve or amend the five annual value-binding choices, then separately approve final D-004 paired-weather acceptance evidence and cold-spell tolerances before HP profiles enter integrated analysis.
non_claims: No annual HP TWh values are executable.
No 2035 HP adoption/electrification value is signed.
No D-004 paired-weather or cold-spell acceptance is signed.
No net-load, event, P(E), threshold, capacity-screen, manuscript, or probability analysis is run.

required_approvals.blocks: Using PBL values as local annual heat-demand input.
Multiplying PBL intensities by dwelling-equivalent counts.
Converting candidate thermal demand into annual TWh scales.
required_approvals.candidate: GJ/year divided by 3,600,000 to obtain TWh/year

required_approvals.blocks: Assigning local space/DHW heat demand to HP-001 building classes.
required_approvals.candidate: CBS 85035NED count-share allocation between SFH and MFH

required_approvals.blocks: Converting local residential heat demand into 2035 heat-pump-served demand.
Treating HP and PV profiles as driven by an accepted same-weather realization.
required_approvals.candidate: exact WEATHER-001 member identity/calendar equality before HP/PV paired diagnostics

required_approvals.blocks: Accepting When2Heat-derived HP behavior under the selected D-004 cold-weather members.
required_approvals.candidate: future signed numerical coldest-window and near-freezing diagnostic tolerances

status: proposed approval checklist only; executable annual HP values and final paired-weather acceptance remain unsigned
